summary: Audited all 12 predictions.json entries with restates_win set but our_verdict != recycled. Recommend changing 11 to recycled (pure restatements or circular derivations from dome parameters). One entry (PRED-095) correctly keeps pending — it is genuinely prospective with specific test thresholds for the Aug 2026 eclipse. Detailed per-entry reasoning in the expansion file. Decider action: update our_verdict to recycled for 11 entries, update notes fields for all 12.
